_note: Monthly USD list prices, verify before publishing (see README sources). RAM in GB. vCPU is the platform's advertised share, which is exactly what this benchmark exists to sanity-check against real throughput. Fly is pay-as-you-go; monthly = ~730h always-on.
_fx: Deploio lists in CHF, not USD. Converted at CHF->USD 1.235654 (open.er-api.com, 2026-07-13); chf_month is the untouched list price from Nine's own calculator API (calculator-api-production.2deb129.deploio.app/product). Re-convert before publishing — an FX move silently reprices the whole platform.
_deploio_ram_note: Only `mini` has verified RAM/vCPU (640 MB / 1 vCPU, read from the running container's cgroup via /bench/info). The other sizes carry prices from Nine's calculator API but unverified specs — measure before quoting them.
_databases: Priced separately; DB plans are not comparable in kind across platforms. heroku essential-0 = $5/mo (shared tenancy). deploio nine-db-xs = 68.20 CHF (~$84.27/mo) — a DEDICATED Postgres VM, ~17x the Heroku DB cost, which dominates deploio's total-cost column and is the main reason RPS/$ and RPS/$-total disagree.
